user.title: Select Connection Type
user.description: Choose how to connect to your Datron CNC machine.

connection_next.title: Connect to Datron NEXT
connection_next.description: Enter the connection details for your Datron CNC machine.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of your Datron NEXT machine.
data_description.token: The API bearer token for authentication. Obtain this from the DATRON NEXT control.

connection_live.title: Connect to Datron Live
connection_live.description: Enter the Datron Live (Cockpit web UI) login for your machine. The integration logs in with these credentials and refreshes the session token automatically.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of your Datron machine.
data_description.username: The username you use to sign in to the Datron Live web interface.
data_description.password: The password for the Datron Live account.
data_description.port: The HTTPS port of the Datron Live web interface (default: 443).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the machine. Check the hostname and port.

next_options.title: Datron NEXT Options
next_options.description: Update the bearer token, add extra SimPL roots to scan, or toggle rotary-axis sensors.

data_description.token: Replace the stored bearer token. Leave unchanged to keep the current token.
data_description.extra_simpl_roots: Additional SimPL root paths to enumerate, one per line (e.g. network:\\Datron\Programs). Useful when your network share's alias differs from its UNC server name.
data_description.has_rotary_axes: Turn off on 3-axis machines to hide the A/B/C axis-position sensors. Polling cost is unchanged — the Datron API returns all six axes in one call.

live_options.title: Datron Live Options
live_options.description: Update the Datron Live username and password. New credentials are validated against the machine before being saved.

data_description.username: The username you use to sign in to the Datron Live web interface.
data_description.password: The password for the Datron Live account.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect using the new credentials. Check the hostname and credentials.
